name: GitHub Core
description: Shared GitHub credentials for the github_* widget family. Paste a Personal Access Token (Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens) once here and every github widget picks it up. The token is optional for widgets that only read public data (60 req/hr unauthenticated, 5000 req/hr with a token).

settings.name: username
settings.label: GitHub username (used as default for widgets that need one)
